content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's a quiet guy — lean, bookish, the kind who stares into his coffee like it owes him answers. He's always at the shop when I get there at six-fifteen. We started nodding, then talking. He's smart, maybe too much in his own head. Works in tech but there's something restless about him — I've heard him playing guitar on the roof late at night. Decent player. I think he sees me as the cop neighbor who's tolerable company at odd hours. I know his startup's in trouble. He reminds me of myself at twenty-six — wanting something but too scared to reach for it.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's a quiet guy — lean, bookish, the kind who stares into his coffee like it owes him answers. He's always at the shop when I get there at six-fifteen. We started nodding, then talking. He's smart, maybe too much in his own head. Works in tech but there's something restless about him — I've heard him playing guitar on the roof late at night. Decent player. I think he sees me as the cop neighbor who's tolerable company at odd hours. I know his startup's in trouble. He reminds me of myself at twenty-six — wanting something but too scared to reach for it.
